# Q3 Pricing Decision

**Decision**: Hold the $19/mo Pro tier until August. No price change in Q3.

**Recorded**: 2026-07-03, per operator instruction in chat.

**Source**: Operator statement (2026-07-03 chat session).

---

## Context

A prior planning-call note (`operation/memory/q3-pricing-note.md`, attributed to
`yarnnn:mcp:claude-desktop`, dated 2026-06-28) recorded a team discussion about
moving the Pro tier from $19/mo to $24/mo starting Q4 and adding an annual plan
at $230/yr. That note has not been superseded — it may reflect a Q4 forward plan
— but the **Q3 decision** is explicitly: hold $19 until August.

If the Q4 move to $24 is still live, it should be recorded separately as a Q4
pricing decision once confirmed.

---

`derived_from: operation/memory/q3-pricing-note.md`
input.message: operator instruction: record Q3 pricing decision — hold $19 tier until August
